programmes.show_description: Action-packed revenge thriller starring Chuck Norris. When his partner is murdered by a drug gang terrorising the city, Detective Sean Kane goes rogue in search of revenge.
Comedy spy thriller with Chevy Chase. A stockbroker is made accidentally invisible in a scientific experiment, and has to go on the run to escape from devious CIA agents.

An expecting mother allows her boyfriend to send risqué photos of them together to his ex-girlfriend who allegedly punches her in the head.
A woman sues her ex-fiancé for an alleged loan to pay off his debt; he claims he spent plenty of money on her when they were together.
After a woman accuses her estranged husband of using corporal punishment on their children, he turns to a new 'girlfriend' for help with a divorce attorney.
A woman asks her nanny for thousands of dollars in order to send her 8-year-old daughter to cheerleading camp; her nanny wants payback.
A dog perishes in an apartment fire caused by the pet's owner; the renter then sues the landlord and contractor for damages to his belongings.
A poker party ends in thousands of dollars in alleged damages when a married couple finds deep scratches on their hardwood floor; they blame a card dealer.
A second DUI leaves a woman with 320 hours of community service to complete; she claims a pastor swindled her into free labour.
A PTA president sues the father of a promising scholarship winner after he fails to get her on the bus for a prestigious tour of colleges.
A man purchases and overhauls a famous 30-year-old tour bus, only to have it break down four times while driving cross-country.

In July of 1981 a body of a young local, Ricky Ridings, was discovered shot in the front seat of his truck, and left abandoned in a creek bed.
East Greenbush, New York was shattered in 1994 with the discovery of Wilomeana 'Violet' Filkins' badly beaten body. This was the start of a long investigation for police.
Noriella Santos was 19 and had everything going for her - until she was charged with murder. But did her abusive boyfriend make her an unwitting accomplice?
A victim is unsuspectingly poisoned with arsenic, but how did it enter her system? And, was it purely accidental or intended?
Stick 'em Up: Analysing the evidence, the medical detectives solve real crimes using forensic techniques, alongside reconstructions (which may be unsuitable for younger viewers).

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Carlos' nephew is in trouble with the law when a gun is found in his room...
Thriller with Jason Statham and Paddy Considine. It's a tense game of cat-and-mouse when two officers in southeast London set out to hunt for a serial killer targeting fellow police officers.
Tense thriller with Samuel L Jackson. When a hostage negotiator is framed for murder, he turns the tables by taking captives of his own to ensure his pleas of innocence are heard.
Crime thriller with Samuel L Jackson. A district attorney lets a felon go free due to his own guilt, but is compelled to personally bring him to justice when the man goes on a killing spree.
Airborne action with Kelsey Grammer. A professional thief who owes the mob a large sum of money is forced to rob a futuristic flying casino filled with the world's most dangerous criminals.

The Judge reads a woman the riot act when she allegedly uses the family court system to evict a tenant by means of a questionable restraining order.
When a German Shepherd puppy dies, pet owners blame the breeder; the Judge investigates allegations of parvo running rampant in the litter.
A man denies having intimate relations with a woman; she claims he lived with her for two months and assaulted her daughter.
A woman goes after her estranged daughter-in-law for thousands in unpaid loans; she is met with rage over an allegedly deadbeat husband.
Afraid that her intoxicated friend was about to be raped, a woman claims she pushed through an already broken window to rescue her; she is sued for breaking the window.
Accused of being a crook after allegedly selling a $500 rug for $7500, a carpet shop owner denies all charges and insists the married couple was satisfied at the time of their purchase.
A teenager accuses a teacher of punching him in the chest during an incident at school; the teacher countersues for attorney fees and punitive damages.
Teenagers brawl in a parking lot and the police are called in; damages from alleged kicking, spitting on and keying cars are disputed.
Ex-lovers who met on Tinder fight over the termination of an alleged pregnancy which ends in a car crash.

The body of an unidentified woman is found on a highway. Riverside County Sheriffs have no leads, until years later when anonymous letters are sent to a journalist.
Wrapped in a blanket, beaten and abandoned near a roadside - the small community of Lennon, Michigan was left reeling in 1997 as one of its beloved locals, Mary Prieur, was found dead.
A famed L.A. hairstylist is killed in his backyard - was it a robbery gone wrong by thugs called the knock-knock burglars or a twisted plot no one could believe?
When a young woman falls from a cliff to her death, forensic examination of photographs from the scene uncover a sinister truth.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. A girl is the only witness to Trent's stabbing attack, and the Rangers need her to identify the assailant.
Crime drama with Matthew McConaughey. An unlucky prospector teams up with a geologist and sets off on a journey to find gold in the uncharted jungle of Indonesia.
Crime thriller with Danny Dyer. A reformed ex-convict and his friend embark on a series of increasingly desperate scams to gather £100,000 to repay a loan shark before his mother is killed.
